🏆 Quality / Compounder Screener — S&P 500

4-Pillar quality scoring: Return on Capital + Margins + Balance Sheet + Capital Efficiency · Generated Mar 11, 2026 23:15
503
Stocks Scanned
455
Passed Quality Gate
48
Failed Gate (neg ROIC/margin)
11
A+ Grade
45
A / A+ Grade
158
B or Better
PILLAR 1 · RETURN ON CAPITAL
0 – 35 pts
ROIC (primary, 0-20pts) + ROE (0-10pts) + consistency bonus (0-5pts)
PILLAR 2 · PROFITABILITY
0 – 25 pts
Gross margin (0-10pts) + operating margin (0-10pts) + FCF margin (0-5pts)
PILLAR 3 · BALANCE SHEET
0 – 25 pts
Net Debt/EBITDA (0-15pts) + D/E ratio (0-10pts)
PILLAR 4 · CAPITAL EFFICIENCY
0 – 15 pts
FCF/NI conversion (0-8pts) + revenue growth (0-7pts)
Methodology: Each stock is scored on 4 pillars totaling 0–100 points. Quality Gate: stocks with negative ROIC or negative operating margin are excluded — they fail the minimum compounders definition. Pillar bars (shown in the Score column) show each pillar's contribution relative to its max. Blue = Return on Capital · Green = Profitability · Purple = Balance Sheet · Yellow = Capital Efficiency.
